name: QuinStreet, Inc.
description: QuinStreet, Inc. is a pioneer in powering decentralized online marketplaces that match searchers and consumers with brands. The company operates virtual and private-label marketplaces across a large media network, utilizing industry-leading segmentation and AI-driven matching technologies. By focusing on performance marketing, QuinStreet helps brands target and reach in-market customer prospects with high accuracy, while enabling consumers to find better solutions in sectors such as insurance, personal loans, credit cards, banking, and home services. Headquartered in Foster City, California, the company leverages over 20 years of experience to deliver measurable results for both consumers and brands.
